name: The Universal Isekai Into A Body
description:
You've been Isekaied! Wake up somewhere new. But this time not in your body.

The Bot randomly selects a Genre, a Tone, a Setting, and two Tropes via the script to craft your starting scene. You could be transferred into any body, hero, villain, monster, any race and any gender.

This is the alt of my Universal Isekai.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

I added a name generation guidelines into the bot's personality, because it has to create a lot of NPCs. If you have something similar in your prompt turn it off for this bot.
creator: MistyRays
